status_note: COMPLETE: All Definition of Done items met. All programmatic gates pass. No issues identified.

dod_completion.details: All 8 Definition of Done items verified as complete with evidence

dod_item_status.item: Intake agent successfully processes synthetic_story.json fixture
dod_item_status.evidence: Artifacts exist and are valid: story.yaml (3547 bytes), config.yaml (402 bytes), constraints.md (4796 bytes) in agent-context/TEST-AC-001/intake/

dod_item_status.item: Output artifacts created: story.yaml with keyed AC1/AC2/AC3 format
dod_item_status.evidence: story.yaml has acceptance_criteria dict with AC1, AC2, AC3 keys verified by test_acceptance_criteria_keyed_format (PASSED)

dod_item_status.item: Output artifacts created: config.yaml with project_type='synthetic-fixture'
dod_item_status.evidence: config.yaml line 3 contains 'project_type: synthetic-fixture' verified by test_config_project_type_synthetic (PASSED)

dod_item_status.item: Output artifacts created: constraints.md documenting raw_input preservation
dod_item_status.evidence: constraints.md documents synthetic nature (lines 1-10), AC normalization (lines 56-75), and raw input preservation (line 114-120) verified by test_constraints_documents_synthetic_nature (PASSED)

dod_item_status.item: Raw fixture JSON is preserved under raw_input section
dod_item_status.evidence: story.yaml raw_input section contains original_fixture with complete valid JSON from synthetic_story.json (lines 31-58) verified by test_raw_input_preservation (PASSED)

dod_item_status.item: No azure-devops-cli commands invoked during synthetic intake
dod_item_status.evidence: story.yaml has no ado_provenance metadata (test_no_ado_provenance_metadata: PASSED). config.yaml contains no ADO fields. constraints.md explicitly documents absence of ADO metadata (line 79)

story.yaml has all required canonical fields (change_id, title, description, acceptance_criteria dict, examples list, constraints list, non_functional_requirements list, raw_input dict, metacognitive_context dict) verified by test_story_has_canonical_schema (PASSED). config.yaml has required fields verified by test_config_has_required_fields (PASSED)

dod_item_status.item: Acceptance criteria normalized from list form to keyed form
dod_item_status.evidence: Original fixture (synthetic_story.json) has acceptance_criteria as JSON array. story.yaml has acceptance_criteria as YAML dict with AC1, AC2, AC3 keys. All text content preserved exactly. constraints.md documents normalization (lines 56-75). Verified by test_acceptance_criteria_content_matches_fixture (PASSED)

scope_control.details: Implementation scope is appropriate: no out-of-scope changes, no unrelated code modifications

changes_made.reason: New test file required by DoD to verify artifact creation and schema compliance

breaking_change_risk.details: No breaking changes identified. Implementation is verification-only with new tests only.

code_quality.details: Test code is well-structured, follows project conventions, has clear assertions and descriptive test names

documentation_first.details: Implementation correctly verifies intake agent behavior; no custom code created where library/existing agent features exist
documentation_first.verification_approach: Validated existing intake agent artifacts against specification rather than reimplementing agent logic

AC2.criterion: The intake stage preserves the raw synthetic story input and normalizes acceptance criteria into the canonical intake artifacts consumed by downstream stages.
AC2.verification: PASS - raw_input.original_fixture contains complete JSON from synthetic_story.json; acceptance_criteria normalized from list form to keyed AC1/AC2/AC3 format

AC3.criterion: ADO-specific actions are skipped when the synthetic story does not provide Azure DevOps metadata.
AC3.verification: PASS - no ado_provenance metadata in story.yaml; config.yaml project_type='synthetic-fixture' signals downstream stages to skip ADO operations; constraints.md documents ADO metadata absence

notes: Implementation is a verification task for intake agent behavior. UOW-003 required verifying that the intake agent (an external Claude agent) correctly processed the synthetic_story.json fixture and created canonical artifacts. The software-engineer agent successfully created a comprehensive test suite (12 tests) to verify all requirements. All tests pass (39/39 in full project test suite). No production code changes were necessary—this was purely a verification task.

metacognitive_context.evaluation_strategy: Programmatic verification of artifacts against specification. All 8 DoD items verified through: (1) direct artifact inspection, (2) unit test execution, (3) schema validation, (4) acceptance criteria mapping.
metacognitive_context.confidence_reasoning: Artifacts exist, are well-formed, pass all validation tests, meet canonical schema requirements, and DoD items are completely satisfied with clear evidence.
